title: FarmERP is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: FarmERP is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
FarmERP invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FarmERP:
FarmERP is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP!
